title: Reality Weaver
brief:
Build your dreams right now! Instantly realize the building blueprints and construction frames in the specified area! Build your helpers!
The Reality Weaver is here!

Superior world home and travel front-line construction essential device, capable of instant realization of building blueprints and construction frames in the specified area as buildings! 
The energy consumption is proportional to the work required for each building (1 Wd per unit of work required). 
Prioritize the use of energy conversion device energy, then the unlimited battery of the fully automatic universal synthesizer, and finally the ordinary battery. 
Zero performance consumption when power is off or disabled.
description:
Adds a button to immediately complete the installation and removal of roofs according to the roof area planning. After clicking, it will build or remove roofs across the entire map according to the current roof construction/removal zone settings.

Supports the "No Thick Roof Planning" of ExpandedRoofing.
the roof building of ExpandedRoofing will be completed by the normal automatic construction mode (since it is actually implemented as a special building blueprint frame).

Adds a button to immediately complete the floor polishing and wall polishing tasks according to the floor polishing area planning. After clicking, it will automatically complete all floor polishing and wall polishing tasks across the entire map.
Adds a button to immediately complete the floor painting and remove floor painting tasks according to the floor painting area planning. After clicking, it will automatically complete all floor painting and remove floor painting tasks across the entire map (without consuming materials).
